name: SEagenthub
description: A portable 6-agent MCP server covering the full SDLC and AWS Well-Architected Framework. Runs architect → codeCrafter → codeReviewer → qualityGuard → devOps in a deterministic LangGraph pipeline with human-in-the-loop deployment approval.

tools.name: execute_software_pipeline
tools.description: Run the 6-agent SDLC pipeline on a GitHub repository. Executes architect → codeCrafter → codeReviewer → qualityGuard → devOps in sequence. May pause at a refactor permission gate or a deployment approval gate and return a PIPELINE_PAUSED message with a thread_id.

github_repo_url.description: HTTPS URL of the target GitHub repository (e.g. https://github.com/owner/repo).

task_description.description: Plain-English description of what the pipeline should accomplish.

tools.name: resume_refactor_decision
tools.description: Resume a pipeline paused at a refactoring permission gate. Use the thread_id from the PIPELINE_PAUSED message and answer Yes or No to the proposed out-of-scope refactor.

thread_id.description: The thread_id returned in the PIPELINE_PAUSED message.

decision.description: Yes to approve the refactor (adds it as an active sub-task). No to skip and continue.

tools.name: resume_deployment_decision
tools.description: Resume a pipeline paused at the deployment approval gate. Use the thread_id from the PIPELINE_PAUSED message and choose Approve (automated deploy) or Manual (generate a deployment guide).

thread_id.description: The thread_id returned in the PIPELINE_PAUSED message.

decision.description: Approve to run the full automated devOps pipeline. Manual to generate docs/deployment_guide.md for manual execution.

tools.name: acknowledge_plan
tools.description: Acknowledge or cancel a pipeline plan returned by execute_software_pipeline. When the task implies remote changes, execute_software_pipeline returns a PLAN_PENDING message with a full execution plan before invoking any agents. Call this tool to confirm you have reviewed the plan (Acknowledge) or to abort with no changes made (Cancel).

thread_id.description: The thread_id returned in the PLAN_PENDING message.

decision.description: Acknowledge (or yes) to start the pipeline. Cancel (or no) to abort before any agent or git operation runs.

runtimes.description: Local execution via Claude Code or any MCP-compatible IDE.
AWS Lambda via Lambda Web Adapter — HTTP requests forwarded to FastMCP on port 8080.

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub Personal Access Token used by codeCrafter to push commits to the target repository.

DEPLOY_DASHBOARD_URL.description: HTTP POST endpoint for the deployment dashboard. Receives status events from the devOps agent.

PORT.description: HTTP port for streamable-http and SSE transports. Defaults to 8080. Set automatically by the Lambda Web Adapter.
